description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have three jobs: build-linux, build-linux-noPoppler, and macosx-bintray. The build-linux and build-linux-noPoppler jobs run on ubuntu-latest, checking out the code, updating apt, installing dependencies, configuring, building, and testing TeXstudio. The macosx-bintray job runs on macos-latest, installing dependencies, configuring, building, and packaging TeXstudio.
